title: Cogni node/service catalog entry
description: task.0374 — single declaration site for nodes and node-shaped services. Consumed by image-tags.sh, detect-affected.sh, ApplicationSet generators, and per-workflow decide jobs. See docs/spec/ci-cd.md axiom 16 (CATALOG_IS_SSOT).

name.description: Catalog entry name. Used as image-tag suffix base, Argo Application name suffix, and deploy-branch suffix. Filename must match name.yaml.

type.description: node = full node app (operator/poly/resy); service = supporting service (scheduler-worker).

node_port.description: K8s NodePort exposed for Compose→k8s gateway access (LiteLLM billing-ingest, edge Caddy upstream). Read by provision-env-vm.sh (COGNI_NODE_ENDPOINTS) + per-env overlay Service patches. Optional — node-type only.

bootstrap_image_tag.description: GHCR tag a fresh fork pulls from upstream's namespace BEFORE its own pr-build has published anything. Phase 4c of provision-env-vm.sh sed-substitutes this into the per-env overlay's `images.newTag`. Lets the first canary deploy upstream's code (proves bootstrap works); argocd-image-updater swaps to the fork's own pr-* tags after its first push-to-main publishes them. Bump when the pinned upstream build goes stale.

node_id.description: DEPRECATED — no longer carried in catalog. Source of truth is `.cogni/repo-spec.yaml::node_id` (read by provision-env-vm.sh Phase 5c and baked into the app image via Dockerfile). Schema retains the field shape so older snapshots still validate, but it is no longer required. See PR #60 — placeholder catalog UUIDs were silently shadowing the real one and breaking per-node Temporal task-queue routing.

dockerfile.description: Repo-relative path to the build Dockerfile.

image_tag_suffix.description: Tag suffix appended to base tags in GHCR. Empty for the historically-unsuffixed operator target; '-<name>' otherwise.

migrator_tag_suffix.description: Tag suffix for the per-node migrator image alias. Empty if this entry has no migrator.

path_prefix.description: task.0374 — repo path prefix that maps changed files to this target. detect-affected.sh uses this to compute the matrix shape. Must end with /.

public_url.description: Per-env subdomain prefix (NOT a full URL). Composed with infra/fork.yaml::domain.root at read time via public_url_for_target. Empty string = root domain (typical for production at the apex). Omit an env entirely to mean 'no public Ingress for this env' (e.g. service-type entries like scheduler-worker). bug.5002 + B2 fork-portability.
